title: MTG Card Search App for iPhone
description: MTG Card Search App for iPhone. Search Magic cards by name, set, tag, or location and find the exact copy inside your collection with Spellvault.

hero.title: MTG Card Search App
hero.description: Find the exact Magic card you need, even when your collection is spread across decks, binders, boxes, and folders.

sections.title: The best MTG Card Search App
sections.description: Spellvault turns your collection into a searchable system, so you can find the right card by name, set, tag, or location.

items.title: Search by card name and set
items.description: Look up cards quickly when you know what you need and want to find the right version without digging through storage.

items.title: Search with tags and storage context
items.description: Use folders, tags, sets, and locations together so search works better in real collections with lots of moving parts.

items.title: Find the exact copy faster
items.description: Spellvault helps you move from search to action, whether you are deck building, pricing cards, or checking inventory.

sections.title: Search your MTG collection in seconds
sections.description: Use Spellvault to find cards faster and stop wasting time checking binders, boxes, and decks by hand.

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Helpful answers about using Spellvault as your MTG Card Search App.

items.title: What is MTG card search?
items.description: MTG card search helps you find cards inside your collection faster, so you do not have to rely on memory or manual browsing.

items.title: Can I search by more than card name?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault makes search more useful by combining card names with set, tag, folder, and location context.

items.title: Can Spellvault help me find cards inside decks, binders, and boxes?
items.description: Yes. Search is especially useful when your cards live across different parts of your collection and you need the exact copy quickly.

items.title: Does card search work better for large MTG collections?
items.description: Yes. The more your collection grows, the more valuable it becomes to search by structure instead of checking everything by hand.

items.title: Can I use search after scanning new cards?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault keeps scanning and search in the same workflow, so newly added cards become easier to find right away.

items.title: Can I search duplicates and card locations?
items.description: Yes. Search is more useful when it tells you not only what the card is, but also how many copies you own and where they are.

items.title: Why use Spellvault instead of manual binder browsing?
items.description: Manual browsing slows down as your collection grows. Spellvault gives you faster lookup and more structure, which saves time every time you need a card.

items.title: Is Spellvault useful for deck building and trading?
items.description: Yes. Fast card search helps you find the right copy for a deck, identify trade options, and move into pricing or organization without leaving the app.
